rulings.Case Title: MAURICE LAWRENCE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 16, 2008 LINE 7, DEFENDANT SCOTT CO.'S OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY RESPONSES TAHT FAIL TO DELINEATE HOW PALINTIFF WILL PROVE EXPOSURE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY AT 136:17-137:4 IS SPECULATIVE AND NOT ADMISSABLE. PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AT 134:13-135:4 CONFIRMS PLAINTIFF'S LACK OF KNOWLEDGE. GIVEN THAT IS THE ONLY EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF HAS OFFERED AS TO ASBESTOS EXPOSURE, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACTS. =(302/PJM/PM)

rulings.Case Title: MAURICE LAWRENCE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 16, 2008 LINE 7, DEFENDANT BAYER CROPSCIENCE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT FACTS 1-5 AND 8-9 ARE UNDISPUTED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO EXHIBIT "A" TO THE MOSES DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE LITTLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 16, 2008 LINE 10, DEFENDANT SCOTT CO. OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BY RELYING UPON PLAINTIFF'S FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. HAVING EXAMINED PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY AND DEFENDANT'S SUBSEQUENT SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. - IN PARTICULAR #'S 2, 3, 5, 6, 21, 30, 31, 49, 58, 59, 77, 86, 87 - PLAINTIFF HAS ASKED REPEATEDLY FOR FACTS SUPPORTING HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEEFNDANT. FOR THAT REASON, PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IS NOT ADMISSABLE UNDER D'AMICO V BOARD OF MEDICAL EXAMINERS (1974) 11 CAL; 3RD. 1,15. THE AY DECLARATION IS NOT ADMISSABLE AS WELL. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE LITTLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 16, 2008 LINE 10, DEFENDANT GRINNELL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE DEPOSITION QUESTIONS TO PLAINTIFF WERE NOT EXPANSIVE ENOUGH TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. (SEE FACTS 9 & 10). DEFENDANT ALSO HAS NOT EXPLAINED WHY IT DID NOT DEPOSE THE FEW CO-WORKERS DISCLOSED IN THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. EVEN IF THE BURDEN SHIFTED, PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION CREATES TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE LITTLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 16, 2008 LINE 10, DEFENDANT SVI CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. IT IS QUESTIONABLE WHETHER DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY RELATED TO HIS WORK WITH DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT. ASSUMING DEFENDANT DID, THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF AND AY CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AND THE OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATIONS ARE OVERRULED. THE COURT STRIKES EXHIBIT "D" TO THE ARCHER DECLARATION. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SOUGHT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. =(302/PJM)
